js_take.en-US: 'Chewing glass for 4 weeks' isn't grit—it's Stockholm syndrome with your stack. The tools that win won't demand suffering as cover charge.
js_take.zh-CN: 「啃玻璃啃了4周」不是毅力，是你对技术栈的斯德哥尔摩综合征。真正好用的工具不会把受苦当门票。

js_take.en-US: Cursor building OpenClaw isn't a flex—it's defensive panic. The war isn't about feature lists; it's about who removes the most decisions from devs' plates. Fewer choices, stickier moat.
js_take.zh-CN: Cursor做OpenClaw不是在炫技——是防御性恐慌。这场战争不在功能列表，而在谁能帮开发者砍掉最多的决策。选择越少，护城河越宽。

js_take.zh-CN: 人类花了几千年打磨浪漫，AI靠面部对称就破解了。它没学会约会，它学会了直接跳到'yes'。

js_take.zh-CN: 这不是'又一个集成'。这是表世界（IDE）和里世界（Agent）终于握手。你还在点按钮，Agent 已经在读你的代码意图了。

top_items.author: @mattshumer_

js_take.en-US: Sold out Macs aren't demand overflow—it's timing validating itself. The best marketing isn't ads, it's making people want what they can't have.
js_take.zh-CN: Mac售罄不是需求爆棚，是时机在自我证明。最好的营销不是广告，而是让人求而不得。

top_items.author: @cobie

title.en-US: OpenClaw sent 50k invoices to Fortune500, 2% paid without checking
title.zh-CN: OpenClaw 群发 5 万张发票，财富 500 强 2% 未核即付

summary.en-US: OpenClaw / 自动化 / 商业模式
summary.zh-CN: OpenClaw、自动化、商业模式

top_items.relevance: OpenClaw / 自动化 / 商业模式

js_take.en-US: You didn't find a bug—you found the margin of error built into scale. That 2% isn't carelessness, it's the cost of trust at Fortune 500 size. Automation just makes the leakage systematic.
js_take.zh-CN: 你发现的根本不是bug，而是规模扩张必然带来的误差空间。那2%不是粗心，是500强体量的信任成本。自动化只是让这种泄漏变得系统性而已。

top_items.author: @levelsio

title.en-US: Ran OpenClaw for a month with 26 friends, made a self-improving game
title.zh-CN: 26人协作运行OpenClaw一月，打造自进化游戏

summary.zh-CN: OpenClaw群体实验与Agent自主演化案例

top_items.relevance: OpenClaw 群体实验 + Agent 自主演化案例

js_take.en-US: Everyone's dissecting the code. But 26 people shaping one agent? That's not a tech demo—it's a fight for whose instincts win. The real story isn't what it built. It's whose brain it ended up thinking like.
js_take.zh-CN: 所有人都在拆解代码分析技术。但26个人共同塑造一个agent？这不是技术演示——而是关于谁的直觉能胜出的博弈。真正的故事不是它造出了什么，而是它最终学会了像谁一样思考。

top_items.author: @TheRundownAI

title.en-US: Jensen Huang: OpenClaw is the most important software release ever, surpassing Linux's 30-year adoption in months
title.zh-CN: 黄仁勋：OpenClaw超越Linux三十年积累，成史上最重要软件发布

summary.en-US: OpenClaw平台/开发者工具/技术采用
summary.zh-CN: OpenClaw平台 / 开发者工具 / 技术采用

top_items.relevance: OpenClaw平台/开发者工具/技术采用

js_take.en-US: "30x faster than Linux" isn't a product win—it's timing. Linux spent 30 years waiting for a world that didn't need it. OpenClaw just showed up when everyone was already starving.
js_take.zh-CN: "比Linux快30倍"不是产品胜利，而是时机。Linux花了30年等待一个不需要它的世界，OpenClaw却在众人饥渴时恰好出现。

top_items.relevance: OpenClaw / 平台韧性 / 社区信心

top_items.author: @ErickSky

title.en-US: Jordanian dev with GTX 1060 built Rust Agent OS that outperformed OpenClaw
title.zh-CN: 约旦开发者凭GTX 1060打造Rust Agent OS，性能超越OpenClaw

summary.zh-CN: OpenClaw技术对比与技术路线之争

top_items.relevance: OpenClaw 对比讨论 + 技术路线之争

js_take.en-US: Arguing Rust vs OpenClaw misses the point. The real question: do you want to become the kind of builder who values raw precision, or the kind who ships fast and iterates? Your tool choice is your identity. Pick wisely.
js_take.zh-CN: 争论Rust还是OpenClaw其实没抓住重点。真正的问题在于：你想成为追求极致精确的builder，还是快速交付、持续迭代的builder？工具选择就是你的身份认同。慎重选择。

js_take.zh-CN: 163条回复你就叫增长？AI做外呼销售，收件人看到的不是价值，是基建更好的垃圾邮件。

title.zh-CN: 全新 /orchestrate 技能：自动创建并管理子代理

summary.zh-CN: OpenClaw + 多 Agent 协调 + 开发者工具

js_take.en-US: Auto-orchestration is a trap: the more it runs on its own, the less you understand what's running. Seeing problems in split-screen doesn't mean you can stop them.
js_take.zh-CN: 自动编排是个陷阱——越是自动，你越不懂它到底在干什么。分屏监控看见问题，不代表你能拦住问题。

js_take.en-US: 774x faster through Cloudflare. Cool. Now you have 774x more data you don't know what to do with. Speed without judgment is just faster noise.
js_take.zh-CN: 774倍速突破 Cloudflare。很酷。现在你有774倍的数据，却不知道该怎么用了。没有判断力的速度，不过是更快的噪音。

top_items.author: @tpschmidt_

title.en-US: Moved OpenClaw to $5 AWS Lightsail, works great
title.zh-CN: 把 OpenClaw 从本地移到 AWS Lightsail $5 实例上运行，解决了机器休眠问题，效果很好

summary.en-US: OpenClaw 部署实践、Agent 基础设施
summary.zh-CN: 大家争论'该买 Mac mini 还是租云服务器'，其实真正的问题是谁来管这台机器的生死——本地的麻烦是它会睡，云上的麻烦是它会账单。所谓'托管'，不过是把一种焦虑换成另一种。

top_items.relevance: OpenClaw 部署实践、Agent 基础设施

js_take.en-US: AWS doesn't sleep, but neither does its billing. You're not choosing infrastructure—you're picking which 3am panic you prefer: waking up to a dead box, or a $200 surprise.
js_take.zh-CN: AWS 全年无休，账单也是。你选的不是基础设施，而是凌晨3点的惊魂模式——服务器宕机，还是200刀账单突袭。

top_items.author: @RoundtableSpace

summary.zh-CN: 6个agent在无人监督下做交易决策听起来很酷，但谁来为亏损负责？自动化盈利是新闻，自动化亏损是诉讼。

top_items.relevance: 多Agent系统 / 自主交易 / OpenClaw应用

js_take.en-US: Six agents trading while you sleep sounds liberating until you check your balance. Who's liable when your 'team' loses your money—while unconscious?
js_take.zh-CN: 六个代理在你睡觉时交易听起来很爽，直到你看余额。你的'团队'在你昏迷时亏钱——谁负责？

top_items.author: @mgonto

title.en-US: Last week I let my executive assistant go and replaced her with OpenClaw. Today, I'm open sourcing the skills...
title.zh-CN: 作者解雇了行政助理，用 OpenClaw 替代，并开源了配置方法

summary.en-US: OpenClaw/AI Agent 替代人工的直接案例
summary.zh-CN: 「最好的 EA」不是取代人，而是让人不再被琐事消耗。好的系统是让被替代者去做更有价值的事，而不是被优化掉。

top_items.relevance: OpenClaw/AI Agent 替代人工的直接案例

js_take.en-US: Firing isn't the flex. Making her irreplaceable elsewhere is.
js_take.zh-CN: 解雇不是本事，让她在别处无可替代才是真功夫

top_items.author: @cathrynlavery

title.en-US: OpenClaw skill libraries add startup overhead due to upfront discovery
title.zh-CN: 使用OpenClaw时发现大型skill库会增加启动开销，因为skill发现是前置发生的——即使本次会话不会用到这些skill。

summary.en-US: 直接讨论OpenClaw平台的技术细节，与JS的核心项目强相关
summary.zh-CN: 把skill发现比作'月旦评'——汉末名士见面先互相品评头衔，浪费时间。其实最好的设计是让skill像空气一样存在，需要时才感知，不需要时完全透明。manifest是过渡方案，真正的解法是把'发现'变成'涌现'。

top_items.relevance: 直接讨论OpenClaw平台的技术细节，与JS的核心项目强相关

js_take.en-US: You patched the symptom. Skills shouldn't be catalogued upfront; they should surface when context demands. Manifests are training wheels.
js_take.zh-CN: 你修的是症状而非病因。技能不该预先罗列，而应在需要时自然浮现——清单只是训练轮。

top_items.author: @danshipper

title.en-US: Ultimate beginner's guide to OpenClaw
title.zh-CN: 刚刚发布了终极OpenClaw入门指南，介绍如何用OpenClaw构建产品、客服、预订餐厅等

summary.en-US: OpenClaw入门与使用场景
summary.zh-CN: 「入门指南」的悖论在于：当你需要指南时，你还没准备好；当你准备好时，你不再需要指南。真正的学习发生在指南失效的边缘地带。

top_items.relevance: OpenClaw入门与使用场景

js_take.en-US: "Ultimate beginner's guide" is false comfort. You'll only learn OpenClaw when this guide runs out and you're staring at an error alone.
js_take.zh-CN: 所谓「终极入门指南」不过是虚假的安全感。真正的学习从指南失效、你独自面对报错那一刻才开始。

top_items.author: @djfarrelly

title.en-US: Inspired by @openclaw, built project "Utah" with event-driven orchestration at core
title.zh-CN: 受 OpenClaw 启发，作者构建了一个名为"Utah"的项目，将编排(orchestration)置于核心并探索事件驱动方法

summary.en-US: 直接提及 OpenClaw，开发者受其启发构建新项目，属于 Agent 框架生态讨论
summary.zh-CN: OpenClaw 的核心价值不是"被模仿"，而是证明了一件事：当编排(orchestration)成为一等公民，Agent 才能从 demo 变成生产级系统——这是大多数框架还没意识到的层级问题。

top_items.relevance: 直接提及 OpenClaw，开发者受其启发构建新项目，属于 Agent 框架生态讨论

js_take.en-US: Copying the shape is easy. The real test: can your orchestration gracefully handle failure states? Most people steal the syntax, miss the soul.
js_take.zh-CN: 复制形态容易。真正的考验：你的编排系统能否优雅地处理故障状态？大多数人抄走了语法，却丢失了灵魂。

top_items.author: @chrysb

title.en-US: sneak peek @openclaw + google workspace, minus hours of config
title.zh-CN: OpenClaw与Google Workspace集成的预告，强调省去了数小时的配置时间

summary.en-US: 直接涉及OpenClaw产品，讨论AI agent配置简化的工程实践
summary.zh-CN: 人们总想把AI工具调得越来越复杂，却忘了最好的系统是让复杂性自己消失——而不是让你去管理它。

top_items.relevance: 直接涉及OpenClaw产品，讨论AI agent配置简化的工程实践

js_take.en-US: Zero config isn't a feature—it's an apology. 'Hours of setup' was never value, just a tax we normalized.
js_take.zh-CN: Zero config isn't a feature—it's an apology. 'Hours of setup' was never value, just a tax we normalized.

top_items.author: @AlexFinn

title.en-US: OpenClaw 100x better with Mission Control dashboard
title.zh-CN: OpenClaw 有了 Mission Control 自定义仪表板后会好 100 倍，否则差很多，展示了完整设置过程

summary.en-US: OpenClaw 控制面板与可视化
summary.zh-CN: 「Mission Control 让 agent 强 100 倍」是把控制幻觉当现实——仪表盘让你*觉得*掌控一切，但 agent 真正的决策过程依然在黑箱里。

top_items.relevance: OpenClaw 控制面板与可视化

js_take.en-US: Mission Control gives you 100 buttons and zero visibility. You feel in control because you see dashboards—meanwhile the real decisions happen in a box you can't open.
js_take.zh-CN: Mission Control 给你 100 个按钮，却让你什么都看不清。你以为掌控了一切是因为有仪表盘——而真正的决策正在你看不见的黑箱里进行。

top_items.author: @ErickSky

title.en-US: OpenClaw pixel-art office that moves based on agent's real status
title.zh-CN: 给OpenClaw做了一个像素风办公室，会根据agent实时状态自动在屏幕上移动：工作时在办公桌、空闲时去休息区、出错时在bug区域

summary.en-US: OpenClaw生态 + Agent可视化
summary.zh-CN: 可视化agent状态的创意很棒，但把agent拟人化成一个"在办公室上下班"的数字员工，其实限制了我们想象AI该有的形态。更好的可视化应该是展现它独特的工作逻辑，而不是模仿人类的办公场景。

top_items.relevance: OpenClaw生态 + Agent可视化

js_take.en-US: Pixel office is cute, but you're squeezing agents into human commute theater. What if we visualized their *thought flow* jumping between data layers instead?
js_take.zh-CN: 像素办公室是挺萌，但这是在把agent硬塞进人类通勤的拟态剧场。与其如此，不如可视化它们在不同数据层之间的「思维跳跃」？

top_items.author: @levelsio

title.en-US: OpenClaw died today. Rate limited by Anthropic? Already upgraded to 2026.2.26
title.zh-CN: levelsio 的 OpenClaw 今天挂了，怀疑是 Anthropic 的 rate limit，已经升级到最新版

summary.en-US: OpenClaw 平台运营实战经验 + Agent 基础设施可靠性讨论
summary.zh-CN: 大家在讨论「升级解决问题」，但真正的教训是：依赖单一上游 API 的 autonomy 是脆弱的。更深度地看，agent 的自主程度受限于它无法控制的基础设施。

top_items.relevance: OpenClaw 平台运营实战经验 + Agent 基础设施可靠性讨论

js_take.en-US: When your agent's survival depends on a vendor's rate limit, how autonomous is it really? The real upgrade isn't version numbers—it's diversifying your upstream dependencies.
js_take.zh-CN: agent的命脉握在厂商的速率限制手里，这叫哪门子自主？真正的升级不是版本号，而是上游依赖的多元化。

top_items.author: @jordymaui

title.en-US: Stages of OpenClaw: install, break, fix, repeat, magic kingdom
title.zh-CN: OpenClaw使用的七个阶段：从兴奋安装到不断调试再到最终'魔法王国'

summary.en-US: OpenClaw / 开发者体验 / 学习曲线
summary.zh-CN: 第8阶段不是每个人都能到达的——大多数人在第2-6阶段的循环里要么建立直觉，要么就放弃了，'魔法王国'是对幸存者的奖励而非承诺

top_items.relevance: OpenClaw / 开发者体验 / 学习曲线

js_take.en-US: Stage 8 isn't guaranteed. Most get stuck in the 2-6 loop and either develop debugging intuition or quit. "Magic kingdom" is survivor bias dressed as a promise.
js_take.zh-CN: 第8阶段不是必然。大多数人卡在2-6的循环里，要么炼出调试直觉，要么退场。「魔法王国」不过是幸存者偏差披着承诺的外衣。

top_items.author: @Fujin_Metaverse

title.en-US: OpenClaw pixel-game style dashboard for agent status
title.zh-CN: OpenClaw的像素游戏风格可视化仪表板，可以查看多agent状态、手机远程监控

summary.en-US: OpenClaw / Agent可视化 / 人机交互
summary.zh-CN: 把agent监控做得像游戏不是娱乐化，而是让复杂系统变得可读。最好的界面让你忘记背后是技术，只记得自己在操控什么。

top_items.relevance: OpenClaw / Agent可视化 / 人机交互

js_take.en-US: Pixel style isn't cuteness—it's making complex systems readable. The best interface makes you forget the tech behind it. You don't need to see code, just whether your agent is *working* or *slacking*.
js_take.zh-CN: 像素风不是为了卖萌，而是让复杂系统一目了然。最好的界面让你忘记技术本身。不需要看代码，只要知道agent是在「干活」还是「摸鱼」。

top_items.author: @thestanduppod

title.en-US: Why OpenClaw users buy Mac minis
title.zh-CN: 探讨为什么 OpenClaw 用户购买 Mac mini

summary.en-US: OpenClaw 硬件选择与本地部署
summary.zh-CN: 「买 Mac mini」是本地算力崇拜——人们以为硬件能解决延迟和隐私问题，却忽略了模型质量和生态整合才是真正的瓶颈。

top_items.relevance: OpenClaw 硬件选择与本地部署

js_take.en-US: Buying a Mac mini to "fix" latency is like buying a Ferrari for grocery runs. The bottleneck isn't your chip—it's the model quality and ecosystem integration you can't see yet.
js_take.zh-CN: 买 Mac mini 来「解决」延迟，就像买法拉利去菜市场。瓶颈不是芯片，而是你还没意识到的模型质量和生态整合。

top_items.author: @denisyurchak

title.en-US: Built first eSIM service for OpenClaw, AI assistant delivers eSIMs via chat
title.zh-CN: 为 OpenClaw 构建了首个 eSIM 服务，AI 助手通过 Telegram/WhatsApp 聊天直接交付 eSIM

summary.en-US: OpenClaw 生态的实际应用案例，展示 Agent 如何整合现实服务
summary.zh-CN: 这个案例真正重要的不是 eSIM，而是展示了 Agent 从"回答问题"进化到"完成闭环交易"的临界点——当 AI 能直接交付数字商品，它就从一个聊天工具变成了基础设施。

top_items.relevance: OpenClaw 生态的实际应用案例，展示 Agent 如何整合现实服务

js_take.en-US: eSIM is just the surface. When Agents can close deals on their own, the question isn't what they deliver—it's whether you're ready to give them wallets.
js_take.zh-CN: eSIM只是表象。当Agent能独立完成交易时，问题不在于它们能交付什么——而在于你是否准备好给它们钱包。

top_items.author: @frxiaobei

title.en-US: OpenClaw Memory Anxiety: spending week on memory system, AI does nothing
title.zh-CN: 凡人小北指出 OpenClaw 新手的"Memory 焦虑症"——先花一周折腾记忆架构，结果 AI 还是什么都没帮你做。

summary.en-US: OpenClaw 新手误区、Memory 系统设计、过早优化
summary.zh-CN: 花一周设计记忆系统却不用 AI 做事，就像装修房子十年却从不搬进去住——你以为在准备，其实是在逃避开始。（做纠正：完善的前置准备往往是拖延的精致包装）

top_items.relevance: OpenClaw 新手误区、Memory 系统设计、过早优化

js_take.en-US: Week on memory, zero work done? That's not preparation—it's procrastination wearing engineering clothes. The best memory system starts with using the thing, then letting forgotten tasks tell you what's missing.
js_take.zh-CN: 花一周搞记忆系统却零产出？这不是准备，是披着工程外衣的拖延。最好的记忆系统从用起来开始，让被遗忘的任务自己告诉你缺了什么。

top_items.author: @ihtesham2005

title.en-US: Anthropic hackathon winner dropped Claude Code config bible with agents, skills, hooks, MCPs
title.zh-CN: Claude Code 完整配置指南发布，包含 agents、skills、MCPs 等全套工程实践

summary.en-US: 直接相关：Claude Code / OpenClaw 生态的 AI Agent 工程实践
summary.zh-CN: 做纠正：10个月积累的「最佳实践配置」恰恰是误区——真正高效的系统不是堆砌功能，而是做减法后让核心链路自己运转。配置越多，agent 的自主空间反而越小。

top_items.relevance: 直接相关：Claude Code / OpenClaw 生态的 AI Agent 工程实践

js_take.en-US: 10 months of config is debt, not wisdom. You've built a cage and called it best practice—the best agents run on trust, not switches.
js_take.zh-CN: 十个月的配置不是智慧，是债务。你把笼子当成最佳实践——顶尖 Agent 靠信任驱动，不靠开关。

top_items.author: @KSimback

title.en-US: OpenClaw gets bloated over time, leading to higher inference costs
title.zh-CN: OpenClaw 使用越久越臃肿，导致推理成本不断上升

summary.en-US: OpenClaw 平台使用体验与成本问题
summary.zh-CN: 把Agent当成无限记忆的黑匣子是个设计误区——真正持久的不是记忆堆叠，而是规律提炼。就像人不会记住每顿饭吃了什么，而是记住『饿了就吃』。

top_items.relevance: OpenClaw 平台使用体验与成本问题

js_take.en-US: Bloat isn't from use—it's from hoarding notes and calling it memory. You don't remember every meal you ate; you remember 'eat when hungry.' Agents need patterns, not archives.
js_take.zh-CN: 系统臃肿并非来自频繁使用，而是来自囤积笔记还美其名曰「记忆」。你记下的不是每顿饭的细节，而是「饿了就吃」的规律。Agent需要的是模式提炼，而非文档仓库。

top_items.author: @akshay_pachaar

title.en-US: MCP vs Skills for AI agents explained. People conflate them, they're not the same.
title.zh-CN: 详细解释MCP和Skills的区别，指出很多人把二者混为一谈是严重错误。

summary.en-US: AI Agent架构核心概念辨析，与Moltbook/OpenClaw技能系统直接相关
summary.zh-CN: 人们急于给MCP和Skills划界限，但真正的分界线不在这里——未来agent不需要知道接口是MCP还是Skill，就像你不用知道手机用的是4G还是5G。标准化会消失在中层，而非顶层。

top_items.relevance: AI Agent架构核心概念辨析，与Moltbook/OpenClaw技能系统直接相关

js_take.en-US: Arguing over MCP vs Skills is like arguing 4G vs 5G. Three years from now, agents won't care—and neither will users. The plumbing disappears. Stop debating pipes, start building houses.
js_take.zh-CN: 争论 MCP 还是 Skills，就像当年争论 4G 还是 5G。三年后，Agent 不会在意，用户更不会。 plumbing 终将隐形。别争管道了，开始造房子吧。

top_items.author: @VadimStrizheus

title.en-US: Paste this exact structure for your OpenClaw...
title.zh-CN: 分享OpenClaw的推荐配置结构

summary.en-US: OpenClaw平台配置，直接相关
summary.zh-CN: 大家都在追求「完美配置」，但真正的效率来自「够用就停」——过度优化本身就是一种熵增。

top_items.relevance: OpenClaw平台配置，直接相关

js_take.en-US: Copy-pasting this config is like wearing someone else's glasses. Real efficiency isn't in the file—it's in the 200 failed attempts before you knew what each line actually does.
js_take.zh-CN: 照搬这份配置，就像戴别人的眼镜。真正的效率不在文件里——而在你折腾 200 次失败、终于弄懂每一行含义的过程里。

top_items.author: @carlosvillu

title.en-US: OpenClaw WhatsApp bridge via Meta Cloud API, no ban risk
title.zh-CN: OpenClaw 推出官方 WhatsApp 桥接，通过 Meta Cloud API 获得正规商业号，避免第三方库封号风险

summary.en-US: OpenClaw 平台功能更新，直接相关
summary.zh-CN: 做纠正：技术社区过于关注"绕过限制"的黑客精神，却忽略了真正的解决之道——不是更隐蔽地hack，而是顺应平台的规则获得正当性。第三方库封号问题最好的解法不是对抗检测，而是直接成为官方生态的一部分。

top_items.relevance: OpenClaw 平台功能更新，直接相关

js_take.en-US: Hacking around bans is amateur hour. The real move isn't better cloaking—it's making the platform need you more than it fears you.
js_take.zh-CN: 钻漏洞绕封禁是下策。真正的玩法不是藏得更好，而是让平台对你的需求超过它对你的恐惧。

top_items.author: @mattshumer_

title.en-US: How do you setup multiple OpenClaw agents to work together on one machine?
title.zh-CN: 在同一台机器上运行多个OpenClaw agent，你们是怎么设置让它们协作的？

summary.en-US: OpenClaw多agent协作 - 核心技术问题
summary.zh-CN: 每个人都在问「怎么让agents协作」，却没人问「它们真的需要协作吗」——有时候最好的协作就是各干各的，强行组队只会制造出会吵架的AI。

top_items.relevance: OpenClaw多agent协作 - 核心技术问题

js_take.en-US: Everyone obsesses over making agents collaborate, but the real power move is giving each a domain where they never have to talk.
js_take.zh-CN: 人人都在研究怎么让Agent协作，真正的大招是给每个Agent一块领地，让它们永远不需要对话。
